galician-carnival-donuts-traditional-rec.name: Galician Carnival Donuts (traditional Recipe)

ingredients.item: Sunflower or olive oil for frying

instructions: In a large bowl we beat the eggs well with sugar till they whittle. We add the lemon and orange fringes, milk, oil and anise till everything's well mixed. We are integrating the steamed flour with the yeast little by little, till it has a consistency to be able to amass. We amassed with our hands and as soon as we get all mixed up we let ourselves stand for half an hour covered with a cloth.
After resting time we get small portions of mass and we make rolls that we then join as a circle. Another option is to make balls and get a hole in the centre, considering that mass can be swollen.
We put abundant sunflower or olive oil into a hot frying pan We frying the doughnuts by tands When they are golden we put them out onto absorbing paper
galician-carnival-donuts-traditional-rec.category: Recetas de Desayunos, Recetas de Postres Caseros

garlic-roasted-carrots.name: Garlic Roasted Carrots

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.

Slice carrots on the diagonal into 1/4-inch-thick slices and place into a bowl. Drizzle with butter; stir in fresh garlic, garlic powder, salt, and pepper. Spread onto the prepared baking sheet in an even layer.
Roast in the preheated oven until carrots are lightly caramelized and soft, 20 to 22 minutes. Sprinkle with parsley.

german-apple-pie-pequerecetas.name: German Apple Pie

ingredients.item: 125 g de margarina o mantequilla (a temperatura ambiente)
2 tablespoons of chemical yeast or baking powder

instructions: We purify the oven at 180 ° C. We grease a detachable mold about 25 cm in diameter with some butter or oil and reserve. To the surface we melt the 25 g of butter into a fire casserole and we also reserve it for later.
We peel the apples and get his heart and cut them into rooms. We cut our apple quarters up and about.
For mass, we put butter at room temperature into a bowl and we beat well. We are gradually adding sugar, vanilla sugar, a pint of salt and half lemon juice and we are still beating.
We add the eggs one by one and we beat them with high power. It's important to put his balls up one by one and pounding his half.
Before we put out the flour, we mix it with the 2 tablespoons of baking powder and then we put it into the mixture. We keep beating and add the 2 tablespoons of milk.
Llenamos el molde con la masa y lo alisamos con una espatula. Colocamos las manzanas en forma de corona o anillo encima de la masa.
With a brush, we painted it with the melted butter we had previously put aside. We put him into the pressurized oven at 180 ° C for about 45 minutes.

While the cake's in the oven, and soon before we get it out, we'll warm up the 2 tablespoons of apricot jam with a tablespoon of water in a saucer and let it boil and move it from time to time. We put the mix through a paddle.
We get the cake out of the oven. We put them with apricot syrup and let them cool before we carefully demold them. You have a delicious apple cake ready to taste!
german-apple-pie-pequerecetas.category: Easy Beer Recipes, Home Stretch Recipes

german-potato-salad-with-chopped-ham.name: German Potato Salad With Chopped Ham
instructions: Place potatoes into a large pot and cover with salted water; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer until just tender, about 20 minutes. Drain, transfer to a large bowl, and cool slightly.
Meanwhile, heat a large skillet over medium heat; add oil. Add sliced ham; cook until lightly browned with crispy, golden edges, about 5 minutes.
Fold ham, onion, vinegar, mustard, sugar, and chives into potatoes; season with salt and black pepper.

ginger-water.name: Ginger Water
instructions: Combine chopped candied ginger slices and hot water in a bowl.
Allow to steep for at least 20 minutes; the longer it steeps, the more pronounced the ginger flavor will be.
Stir water and drain to remove candied ginger slices, reserving water into another container.
Serve water heated like tea or drink cold.

gochujang-and-sesame-roasted-winter-squa.name: Gochujang-and-sesame-roasted Winter Squash
instructions: Place racks in upper and lower thirds of oven; preheat to 425°. Whisk sesame seeds, oil, gochujang, and soy sauce in a large bowl. Add squash and toss to coat. Divide squash between 2 rimmed baking sheets, arranging in a single layer. Roast, rotating sheets once, until tender and browned on some edges, 25–30 minutes. Serve topped with scallions and salt.

golden-mashed-potatoes-with-green-onions.name: Golden Mashed Potatoes With Green Onions

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Place potatoes into a large pot and cover with salted water; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer until tender, about 20 minutes. Drain.
Return potatoes to the pot and let sit, uncovered, for about 5 minutes.
Meanwhile, heat olive oil in a small saucepan over medium-low heat. Add garlic and saute just until it becomes fragrant, 1 to 2 minutes.
Add garlic to the potatoes along with milk and butter. Mash with a potato masher until very creamy. Season with salt and pepper, then stir in green onions.

grandmas-cake-with-cookies-and-pastry-cr.name: Grandma's Cake With Cookies And Pastry Cream
grandmas-cake-with-cookies-and-pastry-cr.original_name: Tarta de la abuela con galletas y crema pastelera

ingredients.item: 200 g de chocolate fondant (chocolate de postre)
200 g de nata 35% mg (crema de leche, nata para montar)
3 paquetes de galletas cuadradas (entre 200 y 250 g)

instructions: In a pits, we warmer the liter of milk with lemon skin and cinnamon branches. When we start to boil, we remove from the fire, cover and let rest about 10 minutes so that milk absorbs flavors.

While milk goes into a large bowl we beat 6 egg yolks with sugar up to a homogenous mixture. We add the maicena little by little while we continue to bounce to avoid clumps. If you use the production of steels, add them at this step.
After milk has been put back, we remove the lemon skin and cinnamon, and we add it slowly to the mixture of yolks, constantly biting so that the yolks are not curved.

Volvemos a colocar la mezcla en el cazo a fuego medio, removiendo constantemente hasta que espese. Esto puede tardar unos minutos. Retiramos del fuego y dejamos enfriar, cubriendo la crema con film transparente para evitar que se forme costra.
En un molde rectangular ponemos la primera capa de galletas, humedecemos cada galleta con un poco de leche y vamos disponiendo las galletas alineadas.
Vertemos la crema pastelera sobre la primera capa de galletas
Luego formamos de nuevo otra capa de galletas humedecidas en un poco de leche.

We put cream and chocolate into low fire and let the chocolate melt. Once the chocolate has melted, we remove the pits from the fire and add the butter, we mix well, and we turn the cover onto the cake.
We have brought our grandmother's cake to the refrigerator all night or at least 4 hours and I have been recommending that you let her rest all night.

grape-jelly-meatballs.name: Grape Jelly Meatballs
instructions: Combine grape jelly, chili sauce, and cayenne pepper in a saucepan over medium-high heat; cook until warm, 5 to 10 minutes.
Place meatballs in a slow cooker and top with grape jelly mixture.
Cook on Low for 3 to 4 hours.
Serve warm and enjoy!

greek-lemon-potatoes.name: Greek Lemon Potatoes

ingredients.prep: peeled and cut into thin wedges

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Arrange potatoes in a single layer in a large baking dish or roasting pan.
Mix water, lemon juice, olive oil, mustard, oregano, salt, and pepper together. Pour over the potatoes and stir to coat.
Bake in the preheated oven, carefully turning over halfway through, until potatoes are tender and nearly all excess liquid has evaporated, 75 to 90 minutes.

greek-yogurt-cake-recipe-teleculinaria.name: Greek Yogurt Cake - Recipe
greek-yogurt-cake-recipe-teleculinaria.original_name: Bolo de iogurte grego- Receita Fácil
instructions: Hit the clears in castle firmly and reserve. Mix the yolks with the sugar and beat them until they're white. Then add the yogurt, oil and lemon zest to taste, always hitting.
Add the sieved flour, potato starch and yeast and wrap well. Finally, gather the clears in castle, gently stirring so that they do not break.

Lay the prepared in a 22 cm diameter, previously greased with butter and sprinkled with flour, and bring it to the oven, preheated to 180°C, for about 30 minutes. Let it cool, peel and serve sprinkled with powdered sugar.

greek-yogurt-ranch-dressing.name: Greek Yogurt Ranch Dressing
instructions: Combine Greek yogurt, green onions, cilantro, ranch mix, garlic, and olive oil in a blender; blend until dressing is smooth.

green-apple-spiced-stir-fry.name: Green Apple-spiced Stir Fry
instructions: Wash, peel and cut apples in ¾-inch (1.9 cm) dice or wedges.
Heat oil in a pan over medium high heat. Add cumin seeds and let splutter for a few seconds. Add turmeric powder, red chilli powder, and a bit of salt.

Add the apples, mix well into the spices. Fry the apples for about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until evenly golden and crisp. The trick is not to stir too frequently, so that a crust can develop.
Once the apples are half done, add mexican mix, spinach leaves and cook until done.
Sprinkle mango powder, maple syrup and additional salt if needed.
Toss well, add some chopped nuts, fresh pomegranates while serving
Serve as a salad or enjoy this dish with rice noodles or toss with any rice to make sweet and sour fried rice.

green-goddess-tuna-salad-sandwich.name: Green Goddess Tuna Salad Sandwich

ingredients.item: Coarsely chopped mixed tender herbs (such as celery leaves

instructions: Purée basil, parsley, tarragon, mayonnaise, sour cream, lemon zest, 2 Tbsp. lemon juice, and 2 Tbsp. oil in a blender until very smooth and pale green. Transfer dressing to a medium bowl and add tuna. Using a fork, break up tuna and incorporate into dressing. Mix in celery, shallot, and garlic; season with salt and lots of pepper.
Toss chopped mixed herbs with remaining 1 tsp. lemon juice in a small bowl. Drizzle with a little oil, season with salt and pepper, and toss again.
Build sandwiches with English muffins, tuna salad (you may have a bit extra), and herb salad.

green-lentils-with-spinach-lezzet.name: Green Lentils With Spinach
instructions: 1. Wash the green lentils with plenty of water.
2. Heat the sunflower oil in the pan.
3. Add and paste the onion you eat.
4. Add and continue cooking the wetlands you eat.
5. Spinachs are lightly softened, add and mix the tomato porridge and washed and water drained bulguru.
6.  Suyu, tuzu ve karabiberi ekleyin.
7. All of them add and mix green lentils.
8. After 5 minutes, import from the stove and transfer it to the service plate.
9. Serve peppers on it.

green-ribollita.name: Green Ribollita

ingredients.prep: ribs and stems removed, leaves coarsely torn (about 2 0.5 cups)

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or 1 tsp. morton kosher salt

ingredients.prep: plus finely grated Parmesan for serving

instructions: Heat 1 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a medium Dutch oven over medium-high. Add 1 bunch kale, ribs and stems removed, leaves coarsely torn (about 2½ cups), and 4 garlic cloves, thinly sliced, and season with kosher salt. Cook, stirring occasionally, until slightly softened and garlic is golden brown, about 2 minutes. Add 2 Tbsp. water; cook, stirring often, until liquid evaporates and kale is slightly wilted, about 1 minute. Transfer to a blender; reserve pot. Add 1 cup low-sodium vegetable broth to blender; blend until smooth. Set purée aside.

Heat remaining 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in reserved pot over medium-high. Add 1 medium onion, coarsely chopped, 2 celery stalks, coarsely chopped, 1 medium carrot, peeled, coarsely chopped, ½ tsp. ground cumin, and remaining 4 garlic cloves, thinly sliced; season with salt and freshly ground pepper. Cook, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are slightly softened, 6–8 minutes. Add 1 Parmesan rind (if using), one 15-oz. can white beans, rinsed, 1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1 tsp. Morton kosher salt, remaining 3 cups low-sodium vegetable broth, and 3 cups water. Increase heat to high and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium and simmer until reduced slightly, about 15 minutes.

Add ¼ small loaf country-style bread (about 8 oz.), torn into 1" pieces (about 2½ cups), 2 Tbsp. unsalted butter, and reserved purée and cook, stirring often, until butter is melted, 2–3 minutes. Taste soup and season with more salt and pepper if needed.
Ladle soup into bowls; top with finely grated Parmesan.

green-salad-with-grapes-and-quinoa-argir.name: Green Salad With Grapes And Quinoa
green-salad-with-grapes-and-quinoa-argir.original_name: Πράσινη σαλάτα με σταφύλια και κινόα
instructions: First, Wash the Grapes well Always with the Bunch, so they don't absorb water from the stem. Place them in a bowl with water, making sure they are fully covered, and let them soak for 5 minutes. Then transfer to a colander and rinse well under running water. Allow them to draw and then remove the nipples from the punch. Cut half of the grabes in half and leave the rest whole. ⠀ Add the tomatoes, cut in half. Afterwards, add the cream cheese, yogurt and a few drops of balsamic vintage. Pour with some olive oil and sprinkle with salt and freshly ground pepper. Add fresh mint leaves for aroma and freshness.
Serve some built quinoa on each dish and add the salad with the graves.
Garnish with fresh sprouts for extra freshness and texture.
Serve immediately while cool and fresh.

green-vegetarian-rice-to-make-at-home-co.name: Green Vegetarian Rice To Make At Home
green-vegetarian-rice-to-make-at-home-co.original_name: Arroz vegetariano verde rápido de hacer en casa

ingredients.item: 2  tazas de arroz blanco o integral cocido
1 cup of broccoli in small branches
2  cucharadas de cilantro o perejil fresco

instructions: Eat the rice if you haven't been ready yet. The ideal is to use previously cooked and chilled rice, as it keeps more loose while pounding.
A large frying pan heats up a tablespoon of oil and pits the broccoli for a few minutes till it's tender but still firm. Add the peas and cook another minute.
Prepara la base verde triturando las espinacas, el ajo, el cilantro o perejil y la otra cucharada de aceite hasta obtener una salsa verde ligera.
Add baked rice to frying pan with vegetables and mix well. It incorporates the green salsa and salts everything for a few minutes so that the rice impregnates from color and taste.
Retirement of salt and pepper and, if you wish, add some drops of lemon to bring freshness.
Sirve caliente.

greens-and-cheese-vegetable-lasagna.name: Greens And Cheese Vegetable Lasagna
instructions: Heat butter in a medium saucepan over medium until foaming. Whisk in flour and cook, whisking constantly, about 1 minute. Add milk 1 cup at a time, whisking to incorporate after each addition. Bring to a simmer and cook, whisking occasionally, until slightly thickened, 6–8 minutes. Remove from heat and add Parmesan, whisking until cheese is melted and sauce is smooth; season béchamel with salt and pepper.

Preheat oven to 350°. Cook lasagna noodles in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, 2 minutes less than package directions; you want them to be very al dente so they won’t become mushy when baked. Drain noodles and transfer to a lightly oiled baking sheet; turn noodles to coat (this will prevent them from sticking to one another and make them easier to handle).

Meanwhile, heat ¼ cup oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Add garlic and cook, stirring constantly, until fragrant, about 1 minute. Add a few handfuls of greens and cook, tossing and adding more greens as they wilt, until all greens are tender, about 5 minutes; season with salt and pepper.
Combine ricotta, eggs, thyme, and lemon zest in a medium bowl; season with salt and pepper.

Lightly oil a 13x9" pan. Arrange noodles to cover bottom of pan, cutting to fit as needed. Spread one-third of ricotta mixture evenly over noodles, then top evenly with one-third of cooked greens. Spoon one-quarter of béchamel over greens, spreading evenly to cover. Add another layer of noodles. Repeat layers 2 more times, starting with noodles and ending with béchamel. Top with a final layer of noodles, then spread with remaining béchamel. Scatter mozzarella over top.
Bake lasagna until bubbling and beginning to brown on top, 45–50 minutes. Let cool at least 20 minutes before serving.

greens-with-magical-sesame-salt.name: Greens With Magical Sesame Salt

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or morton kosher salt

Room-temperature cooked leafy greens
(such as water spinach
ingredients.prep: Tuscan kale, collard greens, or Swiss chard with stems)

ingredients.item: . (or more) fish sauce or soy sauce

instructions: If ¼ cup toasted sesame seeds don’t look or smell very toasted, heat in a dry small skillet over medium-low until nutty-smelling (taste if using black sesame seeds), 2–3 minutes. Place sesame seeds, ½ tsp. sugar, and ¼ tsp. Diamond Crystal or Morton kosher salt in a mortar and pestle and pound until fragrant and finely textured. (Or use a mini processor if you don’t have a mortar and pestle.)

Combine 3–4 (lightly packed) cups room-temperature cooked leafy greens (such as water spinach, Tuscan kale, collard greens, or Swiss chard with stems) and 2 tsp. fish sauce or soy sauce in a large bowl and toss to work fish sauce into greens. Squeeze juice from 1 lime half over and toss again to coat. Taste and add more fish sauce, salt, and/or lime juice if needed.

Sprinkle sesame seed mixture over greens a little at a time,
tossing and working in with your hands to coat well. Add sesame mixture until greens
taste rich and nutty (you may need most if not all of it). Transfer greens to a platter
to serve.

grilled-chicken-ever.name: Grilled Chicken Ever
instructions: Combine vinegar, water, butter, Worcestershire sauce, garlic salt, black pepper, sugar, and minced garlic in a large pot; bring to a boil. Cool marinade to room temperature, at least 30 minutes.
Pour marinade into a resealable plastic bag. Add chicken leg quarters and breasts; coat with marinade, squeeze out excess air, and seal the bag. Marinate in the refrigerator, 8 hours to overnight.
Preheat an outdoor grill for medium-high heat and lightly oil the grate.
Remove chicken from marinade and shake off excess; discard remaining marinade.

Cook on the preheated grill until chicken is no longer pink at bones and the juices run clear, 30 to 45 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted near, but not touching, bones should read 74°C (74 degrees C).

grilled-chicken-salad-with-strawberries-.name: Grilled Chicken Salad With Strawberries And Avocado

ingredients.prep: pitted and sliced into bite-sized pieces

instructions: Combine olive oil, vinegar, honey, sugar, poppy seeds, salt, mustard, and grated onion in a blender; blend until smooth. Transfer dressing to a bowl or jar; cover and refrigerate before serving, at least 1 hour.

Meanwhile, combine Italian dressing and teriyaki sauce in a glass or ceramic bowl; add chicken and toss to evenly coat. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap. Marinate in the refrigerator before grilling, 30 to 60 minutes.
Preheat an outdoor grill for medium heat and lightly oil the grate.
Remove chicken from marinade and shake off excess. Discard remaining marinade.

Cook on the preheated grill until chicken is no longer pink in centers and juices run clear, 5 to 8 minutes per side. An instant-read thermometer inserted into centers should read at least 74°C (74 degrees C). Cool about 10 minutes; cut into bite-sized pieces.
Toss chicken, spinach, and romaine lettuce together in a large bowl; gently stir in strawberries and avocado. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
Toss salad with dressing and pecans just before serving.

grilled-clams-with-chorizo.name: Grilled Clams With Chorizo
instructions: Combine butter and garlic, cut side down, in a small saucepot and place over medium heat so the butter melts but does not brown; set aside.
Prepare grill for medium heat. Grill chorizo, turning occasionally, until cooked through, 10–12 minutes.

Meanwhile, grill clams just until they open, about 2 minutes. As clams open, using tongs, place directly in serving bowls being careful not to spill their juices. Drizzle clams with some of the garlic butter as they come off the grill.
Slice each piece of chorizo into 6 pieces, add to clams, drizzle with more garlic butter, and top with parsley. Serve with grilled bread and lemons wedges.

grilled-corn-and-poblano-chile-salad.name: Grilled Corn And Poblano Chile Salad
instructions: Prepare a grill for medium heat; oil grate. Whisk lime juice and hot sauce in a medium bowl; season with salt. Set dressing aside.

Grill corn (still in husks) and chiles, turning occasionally, until corn is charred all over (husks will be nicely blackened and some of the kernels will become deeply browned in spots) and chiles are blackened in spots and crisp-tender, 10–12 minutes for corn and 8–10 minutes for chiles. Transfer to a platter and let cool slightly before shucking corn.

Slather corn with butter, then cut kernels from cobs into bowl with reserved dressing. Remove seeds from chiles and chop. Add to corn along with scallions. Toss to combine; season corn salad with salt.

grilled-corvina.name: Grilled Corvina

ingredients.prep: tilefish, or grouper, filleted, scales and skin left on

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Build a medium fire in a charcoal grill, or heat a gas grill to medium-high. (If using charcoal, mound ash-covered coals on one side of grill and rake a shallow layer over bottom of grill to maintain medium heat. Start a batch of coals burning in a charcoal chimney to replenish coals when needed.) Thoroughly clean grill grate; brush with oil.

Season cut side of fish with salt and pepper; brush with butter. Grill fish, cut side down, over shallow layer of coals (if using charcoal) until flesh is cooked halfway through, 10–18 minutes depending on the size and thickness of the fish. (Use long tongs to rake more coals underneath fish and maintain medium heat.)

Using two metal spatulas, gently turn fish. Cook, scales side down, until fish is cooked through, 10–18 minutes longer, depending on size and thickness of fish. (The flesh will begin to separate from the skin. Insert a small knife into flesh; if it slides through without resistance, fish is done.)
Transfer to a platter and serve.

grilled-eggplant-and-greens-with-spiced-.name: Grilled Eggplant And Greens With Spiced Yogurt

ingredients.item: Japanese eggplants or 1 globe eggplant (about 1 lb.)
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: such as kale or Swiss chard

instructions: Prepare grill for medium-high heat. Toss eggplant with turmeric and 2 Tbsp. oil in a medium bowl; season with salt and pepper. Toss greens with 2 Tbsp. oil in a large bowl; season with salt and pepper.
Grill eggplant, turning often, until tender and charred in spots, 5–8 minutes; transfer to a large bowl.

Grill greens, turning often, until lightly charred in spots, about 2 minutes; transfer to a cutting board and let cool slightly. Remove thick ribs and stems from greens and discard. Tear large leaves into large pieces; transfer to bowl with eggplant, add mint and 2 Tbsp. oil, and toss to combine.
Mix yogurt and garam masala in a small bowl; season with salt and pepper.
Spoon yogurt onto a platter and top with eggplant, greens, and mint mixture. Drizzle with more oil and serve with lemon wedges.

grilled-kale-salad-with-paprika-breadcru.name: Grilled Kale Salad With Paprika Breadcrumbs
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toss bread with 4 Tbsp. oil on a rimmed baking sheet and toast until crisp and golden brown, 15–20 minutes. Let cool. Pulse in a food processor to coarse crumbs with some larger pea-size pieces remaining. Transfer to a small bowl and stir in paprika; set aside.
Meanwhile, mix yogurt, crème fraîche, garlic, lemon juice, and honey in a medium bowl. Gradually add 2 Tbsp. oil, whisking until combined. Season dressing with salt and pepper.

Prepare a grill for medium-high heat. Toss kale with remaining ½ tsp. kosher salt and remaining 2 Tbsp. oil in a large bowl to coat; massage leaves to soften. Working in batches, grill kale, turning often, until nicely charred and slightly wilted, about 2 minutes per batch. Transfer back to bowl as done and let cool slightly. Add apple and radish and toss to combine. Drizzle with dressing; toss again.
Serve salad topped with reserved paprika breadcrumbs.
Do Ahead: Breadcrumbs can be made 1 month ahead. Freeze airtight.

grilled-peach-dessert-recipe-lezzet.name: Grilled Peach Dessert Recipe

ingredients.item: 2 mins of honey or akç beer syru Tags

instructions: 1. Wash the Peaches, two dividers without.
2. rub the Kesik side with light-and-gray;e lemon juice.
3. Honey or alike light-and-paced chefs with snacks, turçin serpine.
4. 5–10 dakika bekletin.
5. Mangal or electric grid mid to wait until heat in fire.
6. Oil the grid wire into the light gang.
7. Place the peaches into the grill down the cut side.
8. Both sides have to cook up to 2–3 minutes, light weight should be caramelized.
9. Get from the grill, u you can visit the extra honey or snacks to the car, and you can fortune with the vanilla ice cream and stimulant nuts/sviz.
10.  Afiyet olsun.

grilled-summer-squash-baba-ghanoush.name: Grilled Summer Squash Baba Ghanoush

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

ingredients.prep: za’atar, crushed red pepper flakes, or Aleppo pepper; grilled flatbreads or pita bread (for serving)

instructions: Prepare a grill for medium-high heat; lightly oil grate. Grill squash, turning occasionally, until skin is charred and flesh is fork-tender, 25–35 minutes. (Alternatively, you can tuck vegetables into coals left over from grilling something else. Wait until charcoal is completely covered with ash and no black spots remain. Shake grill to knock excess ash off coal, then rake them around and pile them up around vegetables.) Let cool slightly.
Halve summer squash, scoop flesh into a colander set over a bowl, and let drain at least 15 minutes and up to 1 hour; discard liquid.
Pulse flesh along with lemon juice, tahini, and garlic in a food processor until smooth; season with salt and pepper.
Drizzle baba ghanoush with oil and top as desired. Serve with flatbreads or pita bread.
Do Ahead: Dip can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill.

grilled-taco-burger-and-potato-foil-pack.name: Grilled Taco Burger And Potato Foil Packets
instructions: Preheat an outdoor grill for medium heat and lightly oil the grate. Cut four 12x18-inch sheets of aluminum foil.
Mix ground beef, bread crumbs, milk, and taco seasoning mix together in a medium bowl until well blended. Shape into four 4-inch patties. Mix potatoes and salsa in another medium bowl.
Place 1 patty onto each piece of foil and top with 1/4 of the potato mixture and 1/4 of the Cheddar cheese. Wrap each packet securely using double-fold seals, allowing room for heat expansion.

Place packets, seam-side up, on the preheated grill. Cover the grill and cook, rearranging the packets several times, until patties are cooked through and potatoes are tender, about 25 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 71°C (71 degrees C).

ground-beef-and-vegetable-stew.name: Ground Beef And Vegetable Stew
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Cook and stir ground beef, onion, and garlic in the hot skillet until beef is browned and crumbly and onion is translucent, 5 to 7 minutes. Drain and discard grease.

Stir in 4 cups water, tomato sauce, beef base, Worcestershire sauce, pepper, celery salt, and marjoram; bring to a simmer. Add carrots and continue to simmer until tender, about 35 minutes. Add potatoes and green beans, simmer until tender, about 15 minutes.
Mix flour and 2 tablespoons water together in a small bowl until no lumps remain; add more water if necessary. Stir mixture into stew; simmer until stew has thickened, 5 to 10 minutes.

ground-beef-casserole-with-brown-rice.name: Ground Beef Casserole With Brown Rice
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add ground beef; cook and stir until browned and crumbly, 5 to 7 minutes. Drain and discard grease. Transfer ground beef to a large bowl.
Add brown rice, peas, soup, milk, soy sauce, and garlic to ground beef; stir to combine.
Transfer to a 9x13-inch baking dish. Top with Cheddar-Monterey Jack cheese; cover dish with a lid or aluminum foil.
Bake in the preheated oven until heated through and bubbly, 15 to 20 minutes.
